testcase.name: test_workflow_templates_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'categories': ['Assignment', 'Automation', 'Escalation', 'Feedback', 'Integration', 'Payments', ...], 'templates': [{'category': 'Routing', 'color': '#8B5CF6', 'description': 'Routes paid service tickets to Partner pool first, then to Vendor/Freelancer pool after 24 hours if unclaimed', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'action-pool1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'action-pool1', 'target': 'delay-1'}, {'id': 'e3', 'source': 'delay-1', 'target': 'condition-claimed'}, {'id': 'e4', 'label': 'Claimed', 'source': 'condition-claimed', 'source_handle': 'yes', ...}, {'id': 'e5', 'label': 'Not Claimed', 'source': 'condition-claimed', 'source_handle': 'no', ...}], ...}, {'category': 'Payments', 'color': '#10B981', 'description': 'Sends GHL payment link, changes status on payment confirmation, then routes to pools. Example for Media Services > Editing Services.', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'action-payment'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'action-payment', 'target': 'webhook-wait'}, {'id': 'e3', 'source': 'webhook-wait', 'target': 'action-status'}, {'id': 'e4', 'source': 'action-status', 'target': 'action-pool1'}, {'id': 'e5', 'source': 'action-pool1',...ategory': 'Assignment', 'color': '#10B981', 'description': 'Automatically notifies editors when new orders are created and sends email alerts', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'action-1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'action-1', 'target': 'action-2'}], ...}, {'category': 'Escalation', 'color': '#EF4444', 'description': 'Automatically escalates tickets to managers when SLA is at risk or breached', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'action-1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'action-1', 'target': 'action-2'}], ...}, {'category': 'Feedback', 'color': '#F59E0B', 'description': 'Sends satisfaction survey to customers after ticket delivery', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'delay-1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'delay-1', 'target': 'action-1'}], ...}, {'category': 'Automation', 'color': '#6366F1', 'description': 'Automatically closes tickets that have been pending response for too long', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'delay-1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'delay-1', 'target': 'action-1'}, {'id': 'e3', 'source': 'action-1', 'target': 'delay-2'}, {'id': 'e4', 'source': 'delay-2', 'target': 'action-2'}], ...}, ...]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_workflow_editor_fixes.py:265: in test_workflow_templates_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'categories': ['Assignment', 'Automation', 'Escalation', 'Feedback', 'Integration', 'Payments', ...], 'templates': [{'category': 'Routing', 'color': '#8B5CF6', 'description': 'Routes paid service tickets to Partner pool first, then to Vendor/Freelancer pool after 24 hours if unclaimed', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'action-pool1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'action-pool1', 'target': 'delay-1'}, {'id': 'e3', 'source': 'delay-1', 'target': 'condition-claimed'}, {'id': 'e4', 'label': 'Claimed', 'source': 'condition-claimed', 'source_handle': 'yes', ...}, {'id': 'e5', 'label': 'Not Claimed', 'source': 'condition-claimed', 'source_handle': 'no', ...}], ...}, {'category': 'Payments', 'color': '#10B981', 'description': 'Sends GHL payment link, changes status on payment confirmation, then routes to pools. Example for Media Services > Editing Services.', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'action-payment'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'action-payment', 'target': 'webhook-wait'}, {'id': 'e3', 'source': 'webhook-wait', 'target': 'action-status'}, {'id': 'e4', 'source': 'action-status', 'target': 'action-pool1'}, {'id': 'e5', 'source': 'action-pool1',...ategory': 'Assignment', 'color': '#10B981', 'description': 'Automatically notifies editors when new orders are created and sends email alerts', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'action-1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'action-1', 'target': 'action-2'}], ...}, {'category': 'Escalation', 'color': '#EF4444', 'description': 'Automatically escalates tickets to managers when SLA is at risk or breached', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'action-1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'action-1', 'target': 'action-2'}], ...}, {'category': 'Feedback', 'color': '#F59E0B', 'description': 'Sends satisfaction survey to customers after ticket delivery', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'delay-1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'delay-1', 'target': 'action-1'}], ...}, {'category': 'Automation', 'color': '#6366F1', 'description': 'Automatically closes tickets that have been pending response for too long', 'edges': [{'id': 'e1', 'source': 'trigger-1', 'target': 'delay-1'}, {'id': 'e2', 'source': 'delay-1', 'target': 'action-1'}, {'id': 'e3', 'source': 'action-1', 'target': 'delay-2'}, {'id': 'e4', 'source': 'delay-2', 'target': 'action-2'}], ...}, ...]}, list)
